title: Coda Request
description: Message written by the Coda.io pack to trigger scraping. Placed at Public/USIdata/{dev_slug}/{inv_slug}/coda_request_{id}.json. bus.py detects creation and dispatches to the appropriate scraper.

type.description: Explicit scraper type. When absent, bus.py infers from field presence: rpID → rynekpierwotny, otoID/strona_otodom → otodom.

rpID.description: RynekPierwotny offer ID (numeric string). Triggers rynekpierwotny task when type is absent.

otoID.description: Otodom investment ID (short alphanumeric string, e.g. '4uvqs'). Unstable — may change for the same investment without warning. USIfolder is the stable key.

strona_otodom.description: Otodom investment URL. Used as fallback when otoID is absent. Triggers otodom task when type is absent.

url.description: Generic URL used for tabelaofert and grabber tasks.

USIfolder.description: Investment slug — the stable identifier used as the directory name under USIdata/{dev_slug}/.

developer_slug.description: Developer slug for directory structure. Falls back to rpSlug or otoSlug.

rpSlug.description: Developer slug as recorded in RynekPierwotny.

otoSlug.description: Developer slug as recorded in Otodom.

offer_id.description: Alias for rpID used in some request formats.

regex.description: Regular expression for link extraction. Used only for grabber task type.
